title: Skeleton Running Past 👀 / Carl the Skeleton
about:
Skeleton Running Past 👀, also known as Carl the Skeleton, refers to a series of video edit memes centered on an exploitable video element of a green screen skeleton running across the screen and startling the video's subjects, who are given the Eyes Emoji, 👀, to show their terrified shock. The question, "Did you see that?" was also a common video caption. The first known meme was shared by a Twitter / X user named @AbattoirRecord in September 2025.

The skeleton was named Carl by the meme's main proponent, Instagram user @ananas_.nasdas, in late 2025. Skeleton Running Past 👀 memes then spread to TikTok. Overall, the trend was inspired by the Let's Take a Look 👀 and Noticing 👀 memes from the same time period.
origin: On September 13th, 2025, X[7] user @AbattoirRecord tweeted a GIF of Disney characters on Thanksgiving with Goofy holding the turkey. A skeleton runs past the characters and 👀 emojis are revealed on each. Over three months, the post gained over 73,000 likes.
